Gir.name: Gir
Gir.description: A dairy cattle breed known for high milk production and distinctive curved horns. Gir cows are heat-tolerant and produce A2 milk.
Gir.characteristics: Distinctive curved horns, loose skin, reddish brown to white color, medium to large size
Gir.special_features: Heat tolerance, disease resistance, A2 beta-casein milk protein

Sahiwal.name: Sahiwal
Sahiwal.description: A heat-tolerant dairy breed with reddish brown to red coloration. Known for good milk production in tropical climates.
Sahiwal.characteristics: Reddish brown to red color, loose skin, prominent hump, medium to large size

Ongole.name: Ongole (Nellore)
Ongole.description: A draught and dual-purpose breed known for bullock strength. White colored with distinctive hump.
Ongole.characteristics: White color, massive hump, black pigmented skin, medium to large size

Red_Sindhi.name: Red Sindhi
Red_Sindhi.description: A dairy breed with reddish brown coloration. Known for good milk production and heat tolerance.
Red_Sindhi.characteristics: Reddish brown color, loose skin, medium size

Tharparkar.name: Tharparkar
Tharparkar.description: A dual-purpose breed adapted to desert conditions. Gray to white colored with good milk and draught qualities.
Tharparkar.characteristics: Gray to white color, medium size, well-built body

Kankrej.name: Kankrej
Kankrej.description: A large draught and dairy breed with white coloration. Known for strength and moderate milk production.
Kankrej.characteristics: White color, large size, massive build

Hariana.name: Hariana
Hariana.description: A dual-purpose breed with white to gray coloration. Known for draught power and moderate milk production.
Hariana.characteristics: White to gray color, compact build, strong constitution

Rathi.name: Rathi
Rathi.description: A dual-purpose breed with brown color and white patches. Good milk producer with heat tolerance.
Rathi.characteristics: Brown with white patches, medium size, compact build

Murrah.name: Murrah
Murrah.description: The most popular buffalo breed for milk production in India. Black colored with superior milk yield.
Murrah.characteristics: Black color, small head, tightly curved horns, compact body
Murrah.special_features: Highest milk yield among buffalo breeds, good temperament

Jaffarabadi.name: Jaffarabadi
Jaffarabadi.description: A large sized buffalo breed with black or spotted coloration. Good for both milk and draught purposes.
Jaffarabadi.characteristics: Black with white spots or completely black, large size, massive build
Jaffarabadi.special_features: Large size, good milk and meat production

Surti.name: Surti
Surti.description: A medium-sized buffalo breed with black or brown coloration. Known for good milk quality.
Surti.characteristics: Black or brown color, medium size, compact build

Mehsana.name: Mehsana
Mehsana.description: A medium-sized buffalo breed with grey coloration. Developed by crossing Murrah and Surti breeds.
Mehsana.characteristics: Grey color, medium size, compact build

Nili_Ravi.name: Nili-Ravi
Nili_Ravi.description: A dual-purpose buffalo breed with black or dark grey coloration. Known for both milk and meat production.
Nili_Ravi.characteristics: Black or dark grey color, large size, prominent forehead

Pandharpuri.name: Pandharpuri
Pandharpuri.description: A buffalo breed with black coloration. Known for good milk production and adaptability to local conditions.
Pandharpuri.characteristics: Black color, medium size, sturdy build
